get.description: Liveness probe: process is running; includes capability snapshot for operators.
Readiness: DB when postgres; optional 503 if OBR_READY_FAIL_ON_DEGRADED and capabilities degraded.
Return review payload for a thread; 404 if not pending or unknown.

post.description: Create or replace pending review (called by orchestrator on interrupt).
Record approval for thread; 400 if not pending.
Record rejection for thread; 400 if not pending.
Resume the graph after approve/reject by calling the orchestrator service.

AcceptanceSummary.title: AcceptanceSummary

InteractiveCheckApiResponse.description: Interactive check JSON including LSP capability flag.

PolicyResolvedRule.description: One evaluated policy rule for audit trails.

ReviewObligationSummary.description: Obligation context shown in the review UI.
